title: The Content Smp (Fan-Made)
description: A Enhanced Vanilla Modpack wich focuses on adding more variety to the game and unique mechanics.
body:
Please do not use the Curseforge loader, use Atlauncher or something else

This is a Vanilla Enhanced Modpack that focuses on adding more variety and unique mechanics to the game. It is also a recreation of the popular Content Smp.

You should download this Modpack if you like the Content Smp, and by downloading you are also indirectly 
helping the creators get more recognition.
Consider supporting the creator of the Content Smp, doctor4t and his friends:

Arsenal is publicly available on 1.20.1, and isn't compatible with 1.19.2.Links below.

doctor4t   
https://ko-fi.com/doctor4t

Winsweep      
 https://ko-fi.com/winsweep

Cammie      
https://ko-fi.com/camellias

Bonfire      
https://ko-fi.com/8onfire

KodaConstella      
https://ko-fi.com/kodaconstellation

UpCraft      
https://ko-fi.com/upcraftlp

Luxintrus    
https://ko-fi.com/luxintrus

AmyMialee  
https://www.patreon.com/cw/AmyMialee

Credit for doctor4t's Curseforge mods:

Arsenal  
https://modrinth.com/mod/arsenal

Blast💣      
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blast

Illuminations 🔥      
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illuminations

Effective 💦      
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective

Pick Your Poison 🐸      
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pick-your-poison

Paid Mods are not going to be added, support the original creators.

The purpose of this Modpack is to make a public version of the Content Smp Modpack with the original 
owner's permision, and to also get more recongition for the mod creators in the Modpack.

Important information you should know:

I am not the creator of Content Smp and I had permision from the author to create this modpack.
Ask the creators for permision before using their mods and do some research.
All of the mods added through overrides are either credited in the description or good to use in modpacks from the get-go.
Mason Decor is open to anyone for putting into modpacks, as for Cammie's Minecraft Tweaks.
